title: dendropanax heterophyllus
intro: Dendropanax heterophyllus, also known as Japanese angelica tree or Japanese angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Dendropanax heterophyllus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
